app.name: AINA
app.medical_disclaimer: AINA ab jumtukaay ngir xam-xam la. Li nekk fii du wuutal xalaatu sa doktoor.

auth.phone_hint: Telefon dafa gën a yomb email ci sunu réew yi. Su SMS bi tardee, mën nga weyal te amul kont, nga synchroniser ci kanam.
auth.phone_code_sent: Yónnee nañu code bi ci SMS
auth.signup_success: Kont bi sosee na ! Xoolal sa email 📧
auth.terms: Boo weyee, yaangi nangu sunuy sàrtu jëfandikoo ak ni nuy aare say xibaar.
auth.dev_mode_label: Mode test — xoolal ci lu amul kont
auth.guest_note: Say xibaar ci biir telefon bii rekk lañuy dencu

onboarding.vaccines_too_young: {{name}} tuuti na lool, amul vaccin bu mu wara jël léegi.

appointment.add_first: Yokk sa rendez-vous doktoor bu njëkk

growth_interpretation.normal_message: {{metric}}u {{name}} mi ngi màgg bu rafet ci biir courbe bu normal bi. Weyal ci yoon boobu!
growth_interpretation.watch_message: {{name}} mi ngi tuuti ci kaw walla ci suuf moyenne bi, waaye mi ngi ci biir limit yu normal yi. Dañu koy xoolal bu baax ci rendez-vous bu ñëw.
growth_interpretation.alert_title: Wax ak pédiatre bi dina baax
growth_interpretation.alert_low_message: {{metric}} bi dafa nekk ci suufu 3e percentile. Du lu tiit, waaye wax ak pédiatre bi dina tax nga gën a xam courbe bi.
growth_interpretation.alert_high_message: {{metric}} bi dafa nekk ci kawu 97e percentile. Wax ak sa pédiatre dina tax mu gën a xool ni mu méngoo.
growth_interpretation.curve_break_message: Courbe bu {{name}} dafa wàcc walla mu yëkkatiku bu bari ci diggante ñaari natt yi. Dafa gën nga wax ko sa pédiatre gaaw.

red_flag_checker.header_subtitle: Waxal li nga seetlu ci sa liir, lii du diagnostic — ab guide rekk la ngir gindi la.
red_flag_checker.observation_placeholder: ex. Tàngaay 38,5°C li dale ci suba, liir bi dafa bañ biberon, walla jooy yu amul teggi...
red_flag_checker.observation_hint: Gën nga leeral (jamono, tàngaay, melo), loolu dina dimbali IA bi mu gën laa gindi.
red_flag_checker.add_detail_placeholder: ex. li dale ci 2 bës, dafay wome...
red_flag_checker.disclaimer: ⚕️ Lii du wuutal xalaatu sa pédiatre.

chat.online_status: mu ngi fi · ay ndigël rekk la
chat.welcome: Asalaamu aleykum {{role}} {{name}} 👋 Man la AINA IA. Laaj ma lu soxal wér-gu-yaram, nelaw, lekk walla màggug sa liir.
chat.welcome_disclaimer: ⚕️ Du ma wuutal sa pédiatre — su fekkee jafe-jafe am na, seetal doktoor.
chat.limit_reached: Matal nga 10 laaj — sosal waxtu bu bees walla nga ñëwaat ci kanam.
chat.suggestion_cow_milk: Naka la mëna dugalee meewu nag ci lekk gi ?
chat.suggestion_sleep: Sama liir nelawul bu baax ci guddi, looma mën a digal ?
chat.suggestion_fever: Kañ la wara seet doktoor su liir bi tàggee ?
chat.coach_subtitle: waajur buy jàng · laaj yu ñu gindi
chat.coach_welcome: Asalaamu aleykum {{name}} 👋 Fii, du ma la jox tontu direct — damay dimbali rekk nga wut ko sa bopp. Wax ma li xew ci sa liir, ma laaj la laaj yu gàtt, nga mën a xam li ko jàpp.
chat.coach_welcome_disclaimer: 🎓 Mode Coach — damay jàngal rekk nga am reflexe yu baax.
chat.coach_suggestion_crying: Sama liir dafay jooy te xamuma lu tax
chat.coach_suggestion_no_eat: Sama liir dafa bañ a lekk

journal_form.log_deleted_desc: Dindi nañu ko ci téere bi

ai_recipe.ingredients_label: Yan ingrédients nga yor ci kër gi ?
ai_recipe.ingredients_placeholder: mil, mangue, meew, patate douce, carotte…
ai_recipe.ingredients_hint: Tegaleel leen ak virgule — walla bàyyi ko noonu ngir mu jox la togg.
ai_recipe.recipe_saved_desc: Dina nekk ci say togg IA.
ai_recipe.milk_only_body: OMS dafa digal nàmpal meewu yaay rekk ba xale bi am 6 weer. Liir bi soxlawul lekk bu dëgër.
ai_recipe.milk_only_months: {{name}} am na {{months}} weer — {{remaining}} weer moo ko des ci kanam balaa mu tàmbli lekk.
ai_recipe.milk_only_preview: Xool togg yi ngir waajal lekk gi.
ai_recipe.preview_mode_banner: Mode waajal — togg yi bu liir bi amee 6 weer.
ai_recipe.autofill_body: Bàyyi AINA mu sossal la menu bu baax te méngoo ak atum sa liir. Mën nga soppi togg yi ci kanam !

profile_form.birth_weight_kg: Poids bi mu am ci juddu (kg)
profile_form.confirm_delete_body: Mbiru {{name}} yépp dinañu dindi bu dul dellu.

dashboard.care_kit_hint: Xayma garab, ndigëlu tàngaay, xool selles yi

vaccines.education_title: Naka la vaksin di liggéeyé ci yaram ?
vaccines.detail_risk: Jafe-jafe yi mu mën a jur
vaccines.detail_side_effects: Li ci mën a topp (effets secondaires)
vaccines.disclaimer: Lii du wuutal xalaatu sa doktoor. Sa pédiatre moo gën a xam.
vaccines.how_body_defense_html: Yaramu sa liir dafa am sistem buy aar yaramam : sistemu aaru yaram. Waaye sistem boobu dafa soxla ñu jàngal ko mu xam noon yi.
vaccines.how_vaccine_role_html: Vaksin bi dafay wone ci yaram microbe bu faatu walla bu néewwul doole. Bés bu microbe bu dëgg ñëwee, yaram bi pare na ngir xare.
vaccines.how_herd_immunity_html: Vaksiner sa liir, day tax nga aar yeneen xale walla ñi wër liir bi te néew doole.
vaccines.how_side_effects_note: Njàng yi koy topp (tàngaay walla kuux mu tuuti) dafa yomb te du yàgg. Dafa néew lool ci kanamu feebar yi ñuy aar.

growth.no_data: Amul natt bu ñu denc. Yokkal natt bu bees.

development.red_flags_intro: Su {{name}} amee benn walla yu bari ci mandarxa yii, wax ko sa pédiatre gaaw :
development.disclaimer: Xale bu nekk ak rythme-am ci màgg — lii di la gindi rekk, pédiatre bi rekk a mën a wax.

health_report.done_heading: Vaksin yu ñu jël ba noppi :
health_report.footer: Carnet bi AINA moo ko defar — Toppatoo bi Dr Helminah Randriamananoro

nutrition.title: Nutrition

foods.foods_in_range: {{count}} lekk yu ñu dugal ci age bi
foods.detail_conservation_note: Denc purée yu kër yi 48h max ci frigo (ci ndab bu tëju) walla 1 weer ci congélateur. Tàngal li liir bi di lekk rekk, bul ko tàngal ñaari yoon.

nutrition.no_favorites_hint: Cuqal xol bi ngir denc say togg favoris.
nutrition.empty_shopping_hint: Sosal planning repas ngir liste de courses bi génn.
nutrition.age_guard_food_body: {{name}} am na {{months}} weer. OMS dafa digal meewu yaay rekk (walla meewu xale) ba 6 weer. Bul ko jox lekk bu dëgër, thé walla jus.
nutrition.age_guard_food_unlock: Recettes yi ak guide bi ci 6 weer lay feeñ.
nutrition.age_guard_food_rule1: Bul ko jox lekk bu dëgër
nutrition.age_guard_food_rule2: Bul ko jox thé, jus walla ndox mu am suukër
nutrition.age_guard_food_rule3: Meewu yaay walla meewu xale rekk
nutrition.age_guard_planner_body: {{name}} am na {{months}} weer. Planning repas ak liste de courses yi ci 4 weer lañuy feeñ, bu introduction alimentaire tàmbilee.
nutrition.age_guard_planner_unlock: {{remaining}} weer moo ko des balaa mu tàmbli.
nutrition.hint_foods: 🥕 Guide alimentaire — lan nga wara dugal ci lekku sa liir ak kañ.
nutrition.hint_favorites: ❤️ Say togg favoris ak say togg IA.
nutrition.hint_planner: 📅 Planning repas yu ayu-bës bi, bës bu nekk.
nutrition.hint_shopping: 🛒 Sa liste de courses bu génné ci planning bi.
nutrition.menu_editable_hint: Mën nga soppi repas yu nekk 😊
nutrition.source_who_full: Source : Organisation Mondiale de la Santé (OMS)
nutrition.shopping_adapting: ✨ AINA mi ngi defar sa liste...
nutrition.shopping_adapt_market: ✨ Méngool sa liste ak marché bi ak AINA

journal.title: Journal
journal.hero_kicker: Bës bu nekk am na njariñ

care.title: Soins (toppatoo)

dose.max_interval: Toutes les 6h maximum ({{count}} yoon ci 24h) · nga méngool ko ak tàngaay bi.
dose.ibuprofen_warning: Bañ ko jox xale bu amul 3 weer, walla ku am varicelle walla yaramam dafa yoox (déshydratation).

fever.baby_under_3m_body: Tàngaay bu mat 38°C walla lu ko kawe ci liir bu amul 3 weer, urgence la. Demal opital gaaw !
fever.when_emergency: Kañ la wara dem opital gaaw ?

care.disclaimer: Ndigël yii di la gindi rekk. Xoolal notice garab bi te laaj sa doktoor. Urgence gaaw: SAMU 15 / 1515.

bcg.why: Dafay aar liir bi ci feebar bu metti buy jàpp poumon yi.
bcg.disease: Tuberculose dafay jàpp poumon yi (ak yenn saay yeneen organ yi). Dafay jaar ci sëq.
bcg.risk: Ci liir yi, Tuberculose mën na jur feebar yu metti lool (méningite walla poumon yu yàqu).
bcg.side_effects: Mën na jur tuuti reaction ci bërëb bi ñu ko pikiiree te mën na fi bàyyi cicatrice, waaye loolu normal la.

hepb.why: Dafay aar liir bi ci virus buy yàq foie ci kanam.
hepb.disease: Hépatite B virus la buy jàpp foie bi. Mën na nekk feebar buy yàgg te mën na jur cirrhose walla cancer.
hepb.risk: Mën na jaar ci yaay jëm ci liir bi ci juddu bi walla ci kër gi.
hepb.side_effects: Mettit mu tuuti ci bërëb bi ñu ko pikiiree, walla tàngaay bu tuuti.

polio.why: Dafay aar ci feebar buy paralyser yaram ba fàww.
polio.disease: Poliomyélite virus la buy jàpp sistem nerveux bi, te mën na paralyser tànk yi, loxo yi walla noyyi bi.
polio.risk: Amul faj — vaksin rekk moo koy moytu. Mu ngi fi rekk ci yenn réew.
polio.side_effects: Tàngaay bu tuuti, amul yeneen jafe-jafe.

penta.why: Benn pikkiir bu lay aar ci 5 feebar yu metti.
penta.disease: Diphtérie (etouffement), Tétanos (contraction muscle yi), Coqueluche (sëq gu tar), Hépatite B, Haemophilus (méningite).
penta.risk: Feebar yii yépp mën nañu rey liir bu ndaw.
penta.side_effects: Tàngaay (mën nga ko jox paracétamol), mettit bu tuuti, walla liir bi dafay mer 24h ba 48h.

hexa.why: Dafay aar ci 6 feebar ci benn pikkiir rekk.
hexa.disease: Diphtérie, Tétanos, Coqueluche, Polio, Hib (méningite), Hépatite B.
hexa.risk: Su amul vaksin, feebar yii mën nañu metti walla mu jur fatu.
hexa.side_effects: Tàngaay, mettit ci bërëb bi, liir bi di mer 24h-48h. Mën nga ko jox paracétamol su tàggee.

pneumo.why: Dafay aar poumon yi ak bopp bi ci microbe bu tar.
pneumo.disease: Pneumocoque mën na jur otites, pneumonies ak méningites ci xale yi.
pneumo.risk: Méningites mën na fi bàyyi jafe-jafe ci bopp bi.
pneumo.side_effects: Tàngaay bu tuuti walla mettit bu tuuti.

rota.why: Dafay moytu biir-biir bu tar buy tax yaramu liir bi yoox (déshydratation).
rota.disease: Rotavirus dafay jur gastro-entérite bu tar ci liir yu ndaw.
rota.risk: Yaram day yoox gaaw — loolu mu ngi dugal xale yi opital balaa ñuy am 2 ans.
rota.side_effects: Vaksin bu ñuy naan la, amul bari effets secondaires, yenn saay selles yi dañuy tooy tuuti.

ror.why: Aar gu tar ci 3 feebar yu yomb a wàlle.
ror.disease: Rougeole (xuxur ak tàngaay bu tar), Oreillons (melo yu gaaw), Rubéole (bu metti lool su yaay bi biiree).
ror.risk: Rougeole dafa nekk feebar bu yomb a rey xale yi su ñu amul vaksin.
ror.side_effects: Tàngaay ak xuxur yu tuuti 7 ba 10 bës ginnaaw pikkiir bi (normal la).

fievre-jaune.why: Dafay aar ci feebar bu yoo yi di wàlle, te metti lool ci Afrik.
fievre-jaune.disease: Fièvre jaune dafay jur tàngaay, jaunisse, te mën na yàq foie ak rein yi.
fievre-jaune.risk: Feebar bu mën a rey la. Mu ngi fi ci réew yu bari ci Afrik.
fievre-jaune.side_effects: Tàngaay bu tuuti 1 ba 2 bës ginnaaw pikkiir bi, ak tayeel.

meningo-a.why: Dafay aar ci méningite ci réewu Sahel yi.
meningo-a.disease: Méningocoque A dafay jur méningite buy rey gaaw.
meningo-a.risk: Épidémies ci Sahel, xale yi la gën a jàpp.
meningo-a.side_effects: Mettit bu tuuti walla tàngaay bu tuuti.

meningo-c.why: Dafay aar ci méningocoque C (méningite / septicémie).
meningo-c.disease: Infection méningocoque C : méningite walla dereet buy yàqu.
meningo-c.risk: Mën na rey ci ay waxtu rekk. Vaksin bi dafa baax lool.
meningo-c.side_effects: Mettit bu tuuti ci bërëb bi ñu ko pikiiree.

vita.why: Dafay dëgëral sistemu aaru yaram bi te aar bët yi.
vita.disease: Manque Vitamine A dafay yàq gisu xale bi ci guddi te day néewal doole aaru yaramam.
vita.risk: Mu ngi am ci yenn bërëb yu amul lekk yu wute.
vita.side_effects: Amul effets secondaires su dose bi baaxee. Ci gémmiñ lañ koy tofal.

9.label: 9 weer
signs: Mënul a toog sax su ñu ko soutenu-mee
Tontuwul ci coow walla su ñu wooyee turam
Dufay yékkati mbir dëj ci gémmiñam

12.label: 12 weer
signs: Mënul a taxaw sax su jàppee ci mbir

18.label: 18 weer
signs: Dufay xam laaj yu yomb (joxal, kaay)
Dafa wàññi li mu jëkka jàng (dox, wax...)

24.label: 24 weer
signs: Dufay jéem a toftal po (misaal togg...)
Dafay def yenn jëf yu bizarre te di ko répéter

teeth_tips: 🧊 Benn anneau de dentition bu sedd day wàññi mettitug bëñ yi
👆 Massez gencives yi ak sa baraam bu set
💊 Jox ko Paracétamol su tàngaay amee ci poussée dentaire bi
🍌 Jox ko lekk yu sedd (compote walla banane bu sedd)
🚫 Bul jëfandikoo gels anesthésiants — baaxul balaa mu am 2 ans

steps.title: Xoolal mbir bi
steps.desc: Liir bi ndax dafay sëq ? Ndax mën na jooy walla mu wax ? Su fekkee waaw, jàppal ko mu sëq.

steps.title: Melokaan bi
steps.desc: Teggaal liir bi ci sa loxo ci biir, bopp bi wara gën a suufe yaramam, te jàppal sa gémmiñ.

steps.title: 5 tapes ci guinaw
steps.desc: Teggaleel 5 tapes yu deegër ci diggante omoplates yi ak sa loxo.

steps.title: 5 compressions ci dënn bi
steps.desc: Dellool liir bi ci guinaw. Defal 5 compressions ci diggante dënnam ak 2 baraam.

steps.title: Répéter walla woote urgences
steps.desc: Soppi tapes ak compressions yi. Su fekkee jafe-jafe bi mi ngi fi, wooteel gaaw SAMU (15) walla Sapeurs-Pompiers (18).

fever_advice.normal: Amul tàngaay. Toppatoo liir bi bu baax.
fever_advice.mild: Summil ko yëre yi, naanloo ko ndox bës bu nekk, topp ko. Paracétamol du obligatoire su fekkee liir bi mi ngi def bu baax.
fever_advice.moderate_template: Paracétamol {{doseMg}} mg toutes les 6h. Rafraîchir la pièce (18-20°C).
fever_advice.high: Demal opital gaaw, rawatina su liir bi amul 3 weer walla tàngaay bi weesu 48h.
emergency_signs: Convulsions, raideur de la nuque, xuxur ci yaram
Dafay wome bu bari walla mu bañ a naan ndox
Nelaw bu yàgg walla jooy yu metti yoy mënula téye
Tàngaay buy des > 48h te amul wàññi

stool_types.desc: Meewu yaay : selles yu mboq-d'or, yu am grumeaux, te xett bu neex.
Biberon walla togg : gën a dëgër, gën a chocolat.
Yenn saay normal la. Su yàggee: lactose ju bari walla jafe-jafe biir.
Mën na nekk jafe-jafe foie. Seetal pédiatre bi gaaw.
Demal opital gaaw. Mën na nekk allergie, fissure walla leneen.
Mën na nekk dereet buy génn ci biir. Demal opital gaaw.

stool_note: 💧 Diarrhée = ëpp 3 selles yu yomb lool ci bës. Risk yoox (déshydratation) : naanloo ko ndox bës bu nekk, seet couche bi te dem opital su amul wàññi ci 24h.

storage_rules.title: Purée bu kër
storage_rules.detail: Tëjal ko ci ndab bu dëgër juste ginnaaw togg bi.

storage_rules.title: Biberon meewu yaay
storage_rules.detail: Sedal ko gaaw ginnaaw tire-lait bi.

storage_rules.title: Biberon meewu xale
storage_rules.detail: Toggal ko ci waxtu bi, sanni desit bi.

storage_rules.title: Yàpp / jën bu ñor
storage_rules.detail: Mixer ko te sedal ko gaaw.

storage_rules.title: Nen bu ñor bu baax
storage_rules.detail: Cuit dur lay nekk ngir liir bi.

storage_golden_rules: Bul recongeler aliment bu décongeler ba noppi.
Tàngal ko benn yoon rekk, ba ci biir (70°C min ngir yàpp/jën).
Sanni desit bu liir bi laal (salive) ginnaaw 1h.
Bindal date bi nga toggé ci pots yi.
Raxasal sa loxo ak sabu ci 20s balaa ngay togg.
Setal bérab bi ngay toggé ak jumtukaay yi ak ndox mu tàng ak sabu.
Raxasal fruits ak légumes yi ak ndox mu set.
Gën na nga jëfandikoo metal walla plastique, bul jëfandikoo garab (wood) ndax dafa jafe setal.

hygiene_sections.title: Balaa ngay togg
items: Raxasal sa loxo ak sabu ci 20s
Setal plan de travail + jumtukaay yi ak ndox mu tàng ak sabu
Raxasal fruits ak légumes yi ak ndox mu set
Moytul jumtukaay yu garab — gën na nga jëfandikoo inox walla plastique

hygiene_sections.title: Stérilisation biberons (0-4 weer)
items: Dindi yépp ci biberon bi (tétine, anneau, capuchon)
Raxasal pieza bu nekk ak ndox mu tàng ak sabu, te rincer ko
Stériliser ko ci ndox mu tàng 10 min walla stérilisateur vapeur
Bàyyi ko mu wow ci serviette bu set
Ginnaaw 4 weer: lave-vaisselle ci 65°C doy na

hygiene_sections.title: Préparer biberon meewu xale
items: Ndox bu tuuti minéraux (bu ñu bind "pour bébé")
Toppal dose bi: 1 mesurette ci 30 ml ndox
Defal ndox bi jëkka, te jiitu poudre bi, bul ko def inverse
Yëngalal ko tuuti (bul ko yëngal degeer ndax moussage)
Testal tàngaay bi ci sa poignet (wara tiède, du tàng)

hygiene_sections.title: Togg bu méngoo ak liir
items: Togg vapeur: day aare vitamines yi (loolu lañu gën a digal)
Bul ko jox frit, grillé walla braisé balaa mu am 2 ans
Bul jëfandikoo xorom, suukër walla lem balaa mu am 12 weer
Bul jëfandikoo épices yu tàng (kaani, poivre) balaa mu am 2 ans

hygiene_temperature_note: Tàngaay bu baax: repas bu liir bi wara nekk tiède (37°C). Bul ko jox lu tàng walla lu sedd balaa mu am 12 weer.

conservation.title: Denc
conservation.tap_hint: Cuqal tableaux yi ngir xam jamono yi

doctor.about_aina_body: AINA dafay tekki « Dund ak Sawu » ci làkk malagasy. App bii dafa juddu ci bëgg-bëggu Dr Helminah ngir pédiatrie ak bëgg-bëggam ngir jàppandal toppatoo liir ci yaay yi ci Afrik ak ci àdduna sépp.

about.title: À propos de Dr Helminah
about.subtitle: Pédiatre · Ki sos AINA
about.bio: Helminah, juddoo Madagascar, mi ngi defar training pédiatrie ci Dakar. Bës bu nekk dafay gis njaboot yu wut ay tontu te duñu ko am. Créatrice de contenu ak stratège digital depuis 4 ans te bëgg IA — mu dugal dooleem yépp ci AINA ngir wajur yi am tontu bu leer, ci sa làkk, ci waxtu wu nekk.

intro.slide1_body: Sa assistant pédiatrique, bu pare 24h/24 ci sa làkk. Togg, vaksin, màgg — lépp ngir wér-gu-yaramu sa liir.
intro.slide2_body: Bindal ingrédients yi nga yor ci kër gi, AINA dina la sossal togg bu méngoo ak atum sa liir. Dugub, manioc, mangue — lekku sunu réew, du lekk ci téere yi.
intro.slide3_title: AINA IA — sa pédiatre ci sa poche
intro.slide3_body: Laajal laaj yu la soxal, yónnee photo. AINA dina la gindi, waaye du def diagnostic. Ci Wolof, Malgache, Français walla Anglais.
